{{Has quick guide}}
{{otheruses|the quest|the island|The Pandemonium|the pub|The Pandemonium (Pub)|the realm mentioned by the Demon butler|Infernal Dimensions}}
{{Infobox Quest
|name = Pandemonium
|number = 174
|image = [[File:Pandemonium.png]]
|release = [[19 November]] [[2025]]
|update = Sailing is OUT TODAY!
|members = Yes
|series = None
|developer = 
}}
'''Pandemonium''' is a novice quest that introduces players to the [[Sailing]] skill. The quest teaches the player how to sail a ship, dock at a port, and carry cargo.

==Details==
{{Quest details
|start = Speak to [[Will]] and [[Anne]] on the docks of Port Sarim.
|startmap = 3025,3209
|difficulty = Novice
|description = Embark on your first voyage and unlock the Sailing skill.
|length = Short
|requirements = 
|items = * [[Hammer]] (obtainable during the quest)
* [[Saw]] (obtainable during the quest)
|recommended = Fast travel to [[Port Sarim]] to start the quest; Teleport to pest control via minigame teleport or [[Pest control teleport]] and cross to Port Sarim, [[Teleport to House]] (Rimmington), [[skills necklace]] to [[Crafting Guild]], [[Rat Pits]] grouping teleport, [[amulet of glory]] to [[Draynor Village]], or [[explorer's ring]] 2-4
|kills = 
|ironman = 
(Quest info)
|leagueRegion = <poem>
Starts in {{LeagueRegion|Asgarnia}} but is inaccessible due to [[Sailing]] being unavailable in the [[Demonic Pacts League]].
</poem>
}}

==Walkthrough==
===Job interview===
[[File:Pandemonium - Push.webm|thumb|width=250x250|Anne pushing you off the boat.]]
To begin the quest, talk to either [[Will]] or [[Anne]] on the dock immediately east of the [[Food Store]] in [[Port Sarim]]. They will eagerly offer you a role within their new salvaging business. When ready, you will be taken aboard their boat, and the pair will reveal that they want to collect some salvage from an old pirate wreck. They will put you in charge of steering the ship; after clicking the helm to control the ship, use the minimap to navigate south, through the [[Bay of Sarim]], to the wreck east of the [[Ship Yard|Karamja Shipyard]].

{{Map|align=left|name=Pirate wreck|x=3031|y=3035|r=3|mtype=square|caption=Pirate wreck location, east of Karamja Shipyard.|width=220|height=220}}

Upon arriving at the [[wreck]], Anne will ask you to lower the salvaging hook. After deploying the [[Salvaging hook (Pandemonium quest)|salvaging hook]], you'll retrieve a [[mysterious medallion]] and an [[old cup]]. Will, recognising the medallion, will take it and leave you with the cup. Anne will then shove you overboard.

===Pandemonium!===
[[File:The Pandemonium.png|thumb|right|250x250px|The Pandemonium docks.]]
You'll wash up at [[The Pandemonium]]. Speak to [['Squawking' Steve Beanie]], who will recognise Anne and Will as thieves that stole a map to the wreck, breaking the one rule of the Pandemonium. He'll point you towards [[Ribs_(The_Pandemonium)|Ribs]], the map's original owner.

Talk to [[Ribs_(The_Pandemonium)|Ribs]] in the [[The Pandemonium (Pub)|pub]], and he'll share the tale of Crimson Kraken, a deadly vessel captained by the cruel and vicious pirate Barnacle Barnaby. He'll claim that now that Barnaby's medallion has been found, a curse has been unleashed, and will ask you to talk to Steve Beanie again to find Will and Anne. Talk to Steve again, and he'll mention Old Grog, who might be interested in tracking them down. In the meantime, you'll need to acquire your own boat.

===Collecting cargo===
Head east out of the pub, and talk to [[Junior Jim]] on the second docked ship. After giving him the old cup in exchange for a raft, he'll inform you that you need to pick up cargo to get sails for the boat. He'll then take you to the shipyard, where you'll learn how to customize your boat (or in this case, raft).

Pick up a [[hammer]] and [[saw]] from the two open crates to the south, then board the gangplank. On your raft, build a cargo hold in the [[facilities]] hotspot, then use the gangplank to disembark your raft and return to Junior Jim. After giving you a [[Captain's log]], he'll ask you to head over to Port Sarim to collect the cargo.

Use the gangplank to the north east to board your raft, then use the helm to navigate and travel north past the [[shipyard]] to [[Port Sarim]]. Use the [[Buoy (Sailing)|buoy]] just south of the southernmost dock to dock your raft, then use the gangplank to the north to disembark. Take cargo from the [[ledger table]] at the western end of the dock. '''You must unequip weapons before carrying cargo.''' Return to the gangplank to board your raft, then open the basic cargo hold to deposit your cargo.

Navigate south back to the docks of The Pandemonium, parking within the perimeter of the buoys. Open the basic cargo hold and withdraw the crate, then use the gangplank to the north west to disembark. Deposit the cargo on the ledger table at the western end of the dock, and talk to Junior Jim to let him know you delivered his cargo. Finally, talk to Steve Beanie in the pub for an update on Will and Anne, and he'll introduce you to [[Old Grog]], who'll agree to help track them down.

'''Congratulations, quest complete!'''

==Rewards==
{{Quest rewards
|name=Pandemonium|image=[[File:Pandemonium reward scroll.png|centre]]|qp=1|rewards=
*{{SCP|Sailing|300|link=yes}} experience
**An additional {{SCP|Sailing|100|link=yes}} experience is gained when delivering the cargo, for a total of 400 experience
*Access to the [[Sailing]] skill
*Access to [[The Pandemonium]]
*A [[raft]]
*25 [[sawmill coupon (wood plank)]]
*2 [[repair kit]]s
*A [[spyglass]]
}}

==Required for completing==
The completion of Pandemonium is a requirement to complete the following:
* [[Prying Times]]
* [[Current Affairs]]
* [[Troubled Tortugans]]

==Music==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
!Name
! class="unsortable" |Unlock details
! class="unsortable" |Music track
|-
|[[Honkytonky Sea Shanty 2]]
|Unlocked in [[The Pandemonium]]
|[[File:Honkytonky Sea Shanty 2.ogg]]
|-
|[[Yo Ho Ho!]]
|Unlocked in [[The Pandemonium]]
|[[File:Yo Ho Ho!.ogg]]
|-
|[[Life at Sea]]
|Unlocked in the [[Shipyard]].
|[[File:Life at Sea.ogg]]
|}
Upon getting on Will and Anne's boat, a song from a list of songs will play. All songs from this list will unlock if not previously unlocked.
{| class="wikitable sortable"
!Name
! class="unsortable" |Music track
|-
|[[High Seas]]
|[[File:High Seas.ogg]]
|-
|[[Sea Shanty]]
|[[File:Sea Shanty.ogg]]
|-
|[[Crest of a Wave]]
|[[File:Crest of a Wave.ogg]]
|-
|[[Jolly R]]
|[[File:Jolly R.ogg]]
|}

==Transcript==
{{Hastranscript|quest}}

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 26 November 2025
|update = Sailing: Week One Feedback & Fixes
|change = The quest journal for Pandemonium was updated to make it clearer for players to understand how to return to [[The Pandemonium]] during the quest.
}}
{{Subject changes footer}}

==Trivia==
*''Pandemonium'' was first available in the [[March 2025 Sailing Alpha]] and [[June 2025 Sailing Beta]].
*The Playlist for Will and Anne's boat is the same as the songs played at sea in the Sailing Betas, with the removal of [[Sea Shanty 2]].
*During the March 2025 Alpha, the quest awarded the 300 Sailing experience it currently gives. However, during the June 2025 Beta it awarded 512 Sailing experience instead.
*Junior Jim calling the player a "Billy-no-boats" is likely a play on the phrase "[[wiktionary:Billy no mates|Billy no mates]]".

{{Pandemonium}}
{{Sailing}}
